name: Heavenly Dessert Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Neufchatel Cheese should be LIGHT, similar to the Philadelphia brand.
Neufchatel Cheese and it should be softened.
1. Lightly grease the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan with butter or oil. Sprinkle the crumbs evenly over the base. Dust off any excess crumbs.
2. In a blender container, combine the cottage cheese, Neufchatel cheese, sugar, and flour. Cover and process on high speed until smooth.
3. In a large mixing bowl of an electric mixer, beat the cottage cheese mixture with the blended Neufchatel cheese, sugar, and flour until well combined.
4. Add eggs one at a time to the mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. Blend in the milk and almond extract into the batter.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F (160°C) for 45 to 50 minutes, or until the center is almost set. The center will appear soft but will firm up as it cools.
8. Allow the cheesecake to cool completely before removing the rim of the pan.
9. Chill thoroughly in the refrigerator.
10. Top with fresh slices of strawberries or blueberries if desired.
Variation: Prepare the pan as directed; omit the blending step. Place the cottage cheese in a large bowl and beat until smooth using an electric mixer at high speed. Add the Neufchatel cheese, sugar, and flour, mixing at medium speed until well blended. Continue with the remaining steps as instructed.
